caption:
Magnolia Bakery has arrived in London ✨

You can try the delicious Magnolia Bakery banana pudding  along with matcha 🍵 or cold brew ☕️ at Cafe Ciel 

📅 Tues–Sun, 10am–7pm (Until June 10)
📍 Café Ciel at The OWO, Raffles London @cafeciel.ldn @raffleslondon.theowo @magnoliabakery with @londoncoffeeshops 😊

📸 @kseniia.journey
